---

## Wave Description

This wave migrates the MMM Simple PR Admin Model from a single shared root manifest
(`.admin/pr.json`) to per-PR manifests at `.admin/prs/pr-<N>.json`. This eliminates the
concurrent-PR conflict class where multiple agents editing the same root file would cause
git conflicts — the same problem class previously fixed for scope declarations.

The migration is backward-compatible: the legacy `.admin/pr.json` path is accepted as a
fallback during migration. Per-PR manifests take precedence when present. CI bypass blocks
in 3 workflow jobs and 2 gate scripts have been updated to resolve per-PR manifest first.

## Ripple/Cross-Agent Assessment

| Agent / System | Change Scope Assessed | Impact Conclusion |
|---|---|---|
| foreman-v2-agent | governance canon files, CI gate scripts, preflight workflow | NO IMPACT — governance tooling wave; no app code, schema, or public API changed |
| independent-assurance-agent | CI gate scripts (iaa-final-assurance-gate.sh, ecap-admin-ceremony-gate.sh) | NO IMPACT — bypass only fires when manifest declares requires_iaa/ecap: false; IAA enforcement unchanged for governed PRs |
| execution-ceremony-admin-agent | ecap-admin-ceremony-gate.sh, preflight-evidence-gate.yml | NO IMPACT — ECAP bypass requires requires_ecap: false; governance-change PRs remain fully enforced |
| all other agents | no public API, schema, or contract files changed | NO IMPACT — downstream effect: none |

**Downstream ripple conclusion**: NO IMPACT — governance/ceremony artifacts and CI tooling only, no downstream effect on any app, schema, API, or agent contract.
